response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive software engineering experience across diverse domains, including AI-agent infrastructure and cloud-native development, but lacks explicit AI/ML specialization or leadership in strategic cloud/AI initiatives. Her entrepreneurial background and open-source contributions are strong positives, yet the resume does not highlight recognized AI expertise or director-level strategic impact required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and multi-language expertise (TypeScript, D, Java, etc.) with real-world system design experience
Proven entrepreneurial and open-source leadership (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating innovation and initiative
Extensive cloud-native and DevOps experience (Kubernetes, CI/CD, Docker) across multiple high-scale environments
concerns: No clear evidence of recognized AI/ML expertise or strategic AI platform development in the resume
Lacks director-level leadership experience or strategic customer advisory roles mentioned in the job description
Master's/PhD in AI-related field not listed, and AI-specific achievements (e.g., ML models, AI-powered products) are not highlighted

key_factors.factor: AI/ML expertise and strategic AI platform experience
